message:
Harden connectors, add path traversal detection, and migrate E2E tests to PhaseTracker

Aider connector: fix quote-prefix stripping to preserve indentation in
code blocks — match on '>' char instead of "> " string, then strip only
the prefix portion while keeping leading whitespace for nested content.

Claude Code connector: add 11 edge-case robustness tests covering
truncated JSONL (mid-JSON and mid-UTF-8), invalid UTF-8, empty/whitespace
files, JSON type mismatches, deeply nested JSON (200+ levels), large
message bodies (1MB), 100MB+ file skip mechanism, embedded null bytes,
and UTF-8 BOM handling.

Verify page: add multi-layer URL-encoded path traversal detection to the
integrity checker — percent_decode_once() iterates up to 3 decoding
layers to catch single/double/triple encoded "../" sequences, absolute
paths (Unix and Windows), overlong UTF-8, null bytes, backslash
traversal, and separator confusion attacks. Integrated as an early check
in check_integrity() before processing rel_path entries.

E2E tests (e2e_filters, e2e_sources, e2e_multi_connector): migrate from
the duplicated run_logged_test/logged_test! macro pattern to the shared
PhaseTracker from tests/util/e2e_log.rs. Each test file now uses a
tracker_for() helper and explicit start()/end()/complete()/metrics()
calls. Removes ~200 lines of duplicated boilerplate across the three
test files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
